title: ononis pendula var. paui
intro: Ononis pendula var. paui, also known as Paui's Spanish clover or Spiranthera, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ononis pendula var. paui include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal use, and it is traditionally used in Mediterranean and Middle Eastern folk medicine.
